notableEvents.label: Mike Trout reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley. Mike Trout to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Travis d'Arnaud reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Travis d'Arnaud reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jorge Mateo. Josh Lowe out at 3rd, first baseman Matt Olson to third baseman Austin Riley.

notableEvents.label: Adam Frazier pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Adam Frazier walks.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, pitcher Raisel Iglesias to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.
